creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 195521
devel/cquery: Update to 20180718

Hi,
the attached patch updates devel/cquery to version 20180718. The changes to the port are just the version bump and the now required 'pugixml' source code was added to the GH_TUPLE.

I've tested the port with poudriere on FreeBSD 11.1 and 11.2. Additionally I've run the new binary for some hours.

Regards,
Yamagi
